provided_items_frontend.Edit Event Dialog - Dotation participant: PASS - Code verified at lines 959-991 with same 9 items
provided_items_frontend.EventDetailPage Registration Step 2 - Do: PASS - Shows provided_items with icons (T-shirt, Medaille, Sac, Ravitaillement, Photo souvenir)
provided_items_frontend.EventDetailPage - Conditional T-shirt si: PASS - Shows 'TAILLE DE T-SHIRT *' with XS/S/M/L/XL/2XL when tshirt in provided_items

preserved_dossard_contexts.CheckInPage: CORRECT - Still uses 'Dossard' for day-of-event check-in
preserved_dossard_contexts.Chronometrage section: CORRECT - Still uses 'dossards' for timing context
